title: Irish Bread Toast
description: A simple toasted bread recipe inspired by Irish cuisine, perfect for a quick snack.
instructions: Preheat a toaster or toaster oven to 350°F (175°C).
Place the slices of Irish bread into the toaster or toaster oven.
Toast the bread until it is lightly browned.
Spread a layer of bitter orange marmalade on each slice of toasted bread.
Sprinkle crumbled cheddar cheese over the marmalade.
